authority.department: Labour, Employment, Skill Development & Entrepreneurship Department, Government of Mizoram

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Mizoram.

rules.title: Review Mizoram Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the applicable Mizoram Shops and Establishments legislation is required.

citations.reference: Applicable Mizoram Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Mizoram labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Mizoram provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Applicable Mizoram Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Mizoram.

citations.reference: Government of Mizoram Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor State Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments and circulars issued by the Government of Mizoram.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, labour records, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and labour compliance due dates.
